chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
text: In this subchapter, “golf cart” means a motor vehicle designed by the manufacturer primarily for use on a golf course.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.401 — Definition

In this subchapter, “golf cart” means a motor vehicle designed by the manufacturer primarily for use on a golf course.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1233 (H.B.1548), Sec. 16, eff. June 14, 2019.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “golf cart” means a motor vehicle designed by the manufacturer primarily for use on a golf course.
